title: Musk vs. Altman: the $150B lawsuit that could derail the AI IPO of the century
description: One is the public face of the artificial intelligence boom. The other is the world’s richest man, a leading force behind the electric vehicle revolution and a self-styled futurist. title: China's open-source AI models challenge US dominance as Europe grapples with Iran fallout: Report
description: China's artificial intelligence services are surging, with its models processing vast amounts of data. This growth highlights its expanding role in digital knowledge exports. Meanwhile, Europe expresses frustration over the US approach to the Iran conflict, impacting its economy. European nations are questioning US military presence and considering direct talks with Iran.

title: Meta rolls out Ads AI Connectors in open beta for advertisers
description: Meta Platforms has announced the launch of its Ads AI Connectors in open beta, introducing a new way for advertisers and agencies to create, manage and analyse campaigns directly within the AI tools they already use.
